creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Yuri This change appears to duplicate (the version update) that is in bug 203014. 

Can you please:

- Remove the changes that are made here from the patch in the other issue
- Update both issue summaries to correctly reflect the updated changesets
- Set one bug depends on the other, based on the which one should be committed first. Ideally the first one to be committed is that issue which has changes that can be be merged to quarterly first (non version/feature change).

In general, feature updates should be separated from all other updates as much as possible to facilitate easier merging.
